temporal_description:
(00:00-00:05) A low-angle shot reveals a dark, gothic-style building at night. The sky is filled with swirling, turquoise-colored electrical energy and lightning, creating a supernatural and ominous atmosphere. The camera then cuts to a close-up of a young woman with long brown hair, her face illuminated by the strange light. She has a worried and fearful expression as she looks up, her eyes wide with concern. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and dangerous situation, introducing a character who is witnessing a strange and powerful event.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, rumbling sound of thunder and crackling electricity.)
(00:06-00:09) Inside a dark, stone-walled room, a man with a beard and a woman with long hair stand together. The man looks up with a concerned expression, while the woman, standing slightly behind him, looks on with a mix of fear and awe. In the background, a third person is visible in a distant, arched doorway, adding to the sense of unease. (Storyline: This scene introduces two more characters who are also witnessing the strange event, confirming that it is not isolated. Their expressions convey a sense of shared apprehension.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The low rumbling and electrical crackling continue from the previous scene.)
